message:
fix(db): replace TOCTOU request_contact with atomic INSERT OR IGNORE upsert

Replace the select-then-insert/update pattern in request_contact()
with an atomic INSERT OR IGNORE + ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE upsert. This
eliminates a TOCTOU race condition where concurrent send_message
auto-handshake calls (multiple agents requesting contact for the same
pair simultaneously) could fail with unique constraint violations.

The new approach:
1. Single INSERT OR IGNORE ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE setting status,
   reason, updated_ts, and expires_ts
2. Follow-up SELECT to fetch the upserted row
3. Eliminates the entire match-on-existing branch with its separate
   insert/update code paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
